label: ESG
blurb: Climate exposure of STG's leaf-growing regions (live NOAA ENSO state), the SBTi net-zero pathway, and the e-commerce footprint. Mostly public + agent-fetched; per-region water-stress is illustrative.

markers.label: Indonesia — Semarang
markers.detail: Wrapper/binder leaf region. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) compliance exposure on the growing region, plus ENSO-driven drought/flood risk. *Per-region water-stress (WRI Aqueduct) illustrative until wired.

markers.label: Dominican Republic
markers.detail: Largest leaf + handmade region. Climate exposure tracked via the live NOAA ENSO signal; *water-stress (WRI Aqueduct) illustrative.

markers.label: Honduras — Danlí
markers.detail: Central-America 'dry corridor' — drought-prone and strongly ENSO-sensitive (El Niño = drier).

markers.label: Nicaragua — Estelí
markers.detail: Dry-corridor handmade leaf region; rainfall swings with ENSO.

markers.label: Sri Lanka — Biyagama
markers.detail: Wrapper/binder leaf; monsoon timing is ENSO-sensitive.

markers.label: US online / catalogue (NAOR)
markers.detail: The US direct-to-consumer business — historically ~25m catalogues mailed across five websites. Catalogue volumes are being cut for cost and environmental footprint.

markers.label: Group HQ — Copenhagen
markers.detail: SBTi-committed: net-zero value chain by 2050; Scope 1 & 2 down 4.2%/yr from a 2020 base; ≥67% of Scope 3 emissions engaged with suppliers by 2030.

agentNote: Leaf-region climate is the live NOAA CPC ENSO (ONI) signal — ENSO drives drought/flood across the tropical leaf base. SBTi figures are STG's public commitments (net-zero value chain by 2050; Scope 1 & 2 −4.2%/yr from a 2020 base; ≥67% of Scope 3 engaged by 2030). Per-region water-stress (WRI Aqueduct) + per-site Scope 1/2 are illustrative* until wired/sourced.
